title: Section 103
content: In the case of a raiyat who at the commencement of this Act does not own land in excess of a basic holding, all lands owned by him and held by under-raiyats at such commencement shall, subject to the provisions of sub-section (2) of section 102, be deemed to have been reserved for his personal cultivation. Explanation.-- Any transfer of land made on or after the 10th August, 1957 shall be disregarded in determining the extent of land owned by a raiyat at the commencement of this Act.
